name: universal-sso
description: Universal Single Sign-On demonstration with Keycloak, Flask API, and React frontend

scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.test:quick: cd api && python3 -m pytest --quiet && cd ../web && npm run test:run --reporter=basic
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:api && npm run test:coverage:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.lint:api: cd api && python3 -m flake8 . && python3 -m black --check . && python3 -m isort --check-only .
scripts.fix: npm run fix:api && npm run fix:web
scripts.fix:api: cd api && python3 -m black . && python3 -m isort .
scripts.install:all: npm run install:api && npm run install:web
scripts.clean: cd api && rm -rf .pytest_cache __pycache__ htmlcov .coverage && cd ../web && rm -rf coverage node_modules/.cache

author: acaradonna
